summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

sentiment.positive: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます

sentiment.neutral: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます

raw_articles.title: Infuriating Google commercial imagines the founding fathers embracing AI
raw_articles.summary: "Group project, but make it 1776." That's how a new commercial for Google Workspace opens. And things only get cringier from there. The clip imagines what it would be like if the founding fathers turned to Google's collaboration tools and Gemini to help them draft the Declaration of Independence. Ben Franklin texts Thomas Jefferson to […]

raw_articles.title: AWS Introduces Amazon S3 Annotations
raw_articles.summary: AWS recently announced Amazon S3 Annotations, a feature that lets teams attach rich, searchable context such as summaries, classifications, compliance data, or AI-generated insights directly to S3 objects. Annotations can be updated independently of the object and queried across datasets, reducing the need for separate metadata systems. By Renato Losio

raw_articles.title: Claude Reaches GA on Microsoft Foundry: European Enterprises Cannot Deploy It
raw_articles.summary: Claude models reached GA on Microsoft Foundry with Azure-native billing and governance, but no European data zone exists. Anthropic's own documentation confirms data residency guarantees apply to Bedrock and Vertex AI but not Foundry. European practitioners from banking and healthcare report the offering is unapproved for production. By Steef-Jan Wiggers
